ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rental_data" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental record */,
  "instant" INTEGER /* Sequential number for the record */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the rental */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year */,
  "yr" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "mnth" INTEGER /* Month */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Holiday indicator (0 for non-holiday, 1 for holiday) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Weekday (0=Sunday, 1=Monday, ..., 6=Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Working day indicator (0 for non-working day, 1 for working day) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Average apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed in m/s */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users */,
  "cnt" INTEGER /* Total rental count */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike station where the rental occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "rental_type" TEXT /* Type of rental (e.g., one-way, round-trip) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_dteday FOREIGN KEY ("dteday") REFERENCES weather_conditions ("dteday"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_data_holiday FOREIGN KEY ("holiday") REFERENCES holidays ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bike station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bike station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the bike station */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the bike station is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the bike station is located */,
  "bike_racks" INTEGER /* Number of bike racks available at the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (casual or registered) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered with the system */,
  "name" TEXT /* User's name */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "age" INTEGER /* User's age */,
  "gender" TEXT /* User's gender */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition record */,
  "dteday" TEXT /* Date of the weather record */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather conditions */,
  "temp" REAL /* Average temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Average apparent temperature in Celsius */,
  "hum" REAL /* Average humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed in m/s */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation on the given day */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind on the given day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_month" INTEGER /* Starting month of the season */,
  "end_month" INTEGER /* Ending month of the season */,
  "season_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "holiday_type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., federal, state, school) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_patterns" (
  "pattern_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the usage pattern */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the pattern */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the pattern */,
  "avg_usage" INTEGER /* Average usage during the pattern */,
  "peak_usage" INTEGER /* Peak usage during the pattern */,
  "pattern_type" TEXT /* Type of usage pattern (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "avg_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature during the pattern */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pattern_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the station where maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity (e.g., routine, repair, replacement) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_category" TEXT /* Category of the report (e.g., usage, revenue, maintenance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the feedback */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., suggestion, complaint, appreciation) */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* User's rating of the bike-sharing system (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
